studio.title: AI Studio
studio.emptyHint: Enter a topic on the left and click "Generate AI Script" to start

review.title: Smart Review
review.filterDescription: Uses purely objective criteria (duration, hook, CTA) for initial quality control. Creatives passing AI scoring can proceed to manual review.

error.title: Something went wrong

knowledge.pageDescription: Manage review dimensions, guidelines, examples and general knowledge to drive AI-powered reviews

knowledge.noDimensionsDescription: Review dimensions define the criteria for AI-powered reviews
knowledge.noFeedbackDescription: Feedback candidates are generated when human reviewers override AI decisions
